Ms. Lavanya, Scientific Officer ( Bio-pesticide and Bio Control). 2. Dr. K. Damodara Chari, Assistant Scientific Officer (Microbiology. [F.No.13029/03/2019 -PP.I (e75314)] ATISH CHANDRA, Jt.
